body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 72/2026
Made under: Health Professions And Occupations Act
Published in: No. 8 – B.C. Regs. 62 to 76, May 5, 2026
Deposit date: April 30, 2026

B.C. Reg. 72/2026, deposited April 30, 2026, under theHEALTH PROFESSIONS AND OCCUPATIONS ACT[section 645]. Order in Council 170/2026, approved and ordered April 30, 2026. On the recommendation of the undersigned, the Lieutenant Governor, by and with
         the advice and consent of the Executive Council, orders that the part of section 1
         not yet in force of theHealth Professions and Occupations Act, S.B.C. 2022, c. 43, is brought into force. — J. OSBORNE,Minister of Health; S. CHANDRA HERBERT,Presiding Member of the Executive Council. Index Page|Previous Regulation|Next Regulation|Cumulative Index Page Copyright © 2026: King's Printer, Victoria, British Columbia, Canada

minutes_briefs.title: Health Professions and Occupations Act section 1 takes effect in BC
minutes_briefs.summary: The BC government has brought into force a previously unenacted part of section 1 of the Health Professions and Occupations Act (a law that sets rules for health professionals and their regulatory bodies). This means that certain definitions or provisions in that section are now legally active, which could affect how health professions are regulated in the province.
